use_cases: Displaying frequently asked questions with auto-rotating typewriter animation for user engagement
Providing a contact support button for customer inquiries
Showcasing example questions that demonstrate the types of issues the support team can address
Serving as a minimal, branded support widget for SaaS products
Acting as an onboarding or help section component in product documentation
ai_summary: A minimalist support card component featuring a typewriter animation that cycles through example questions every 5.5 seconds. The card displays a tag header, descriptive support text, and a contact button with hover states. Designed for SaaS platforms, it provides a clean interface for displaying FAQs and guiding users to contact support for assistance.
